summary: Iteration 121: Daily Summary Range Bug Fix verified. The bug where the 'Day by Day' view was missing days and showing incorrect sales totals is FIXED. Backend API now returns ALL dates in the requested range (including days with zero data). Frontend table renders all days continuously with no gaps. Sales totals match the /api/sales endpoint.

issues: Minor hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Day by Day view tests passed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data from 2026-03 range
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Summary Range bug fix verified. The fix in dashboard.py (lines 755-762) pre-populates the daily dict with all dates from start_date to end_date before overlaying actual data, ensuring no days are skipped.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Day by Day view was missing days and showing incorrect sales totals
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: daily dict was only populated from records that existed, so days with no transactions were absent
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Pre-populate daily dict with all dates in the requested range (lines 755-762 in dashboard.py)

verification_results.no_gaps_in_dates: PASS - All dates continuous with no missing days
verification_results.zero_data_days_present: PASS - Days with no data show SAR 0.00 instead of being absent
verification_results.net_cash_calculations: PASS - Net cash and net bank calculated correctly per day
verification_results.chart_renders: PASS - Profit Trend chart shows all dates on x-axis
